projects.title: Memvia
projects.subtitle: Resume memory assistant
projects.description: Built Memvia to draft tailored resume content and application answers from a curated memory store.
projects.extendedDescription: Developed the FastAPI, Pydantic AI, OpenRouter, SQLite, React, TypeScript, Tailwind, and Vite stack by hand. The app retrieves relevant memories with vector search and produces application-ready responses or resume drafts while preserving strict formatting.

media.alt: Memvia resume memory assistant interface screenshot

projects.impact: Shows the full product loop: memory, retrieval, drafting, and frontend/backend integration.

projects.title: Nero
projects.subtitle: Voice tracking assistant
projects.description: Developed Nero, a mobile voice assistant for workouts, nutrition, and spending.
projects.extendedDescription: Built practical daily flows around voice input, tool calls, and personal data. Integrated AssemblyAI and ElevenLabs for voice, Plaid for spending, and tracking for workouts and nutrition.

media.alt: Nero mobile voice assistant demo showing personal tracking.

projects.impact: Turns routine tracking into simple voice commands.

projects.title: Pizza Phone Agent
projects.subtitle: Phone orders into live tickets
projects.description: Built a phone agent that takes pizza orders with Deepgram and Twilio and creates tickets for staff.
projects.extendedDescription: Developed the Python voice backend with tool calls for menu lookup and order tracking, then built a frontend dashboard for tickets and call history. The same pattern can support phone-based service in other businesses.

media.alt: Pizza voice AI agent demo showcasing an AI agent that takes pizza orders over phone.

projects.impact: Shows how phone orders can become live staff tickets.

projects.title: Physics Grad Match
projects.subtitle: Professor matching app
projects.description: Built Physics Grad Match, a web app that matches physics applicants with professors by research niche.
projects.extendedDescription: Scraped university physics departments to build a professor database, extracted applicant research keywords with an LLM, and matched users through vector search. Added Stripe checkout, Supabase storage, and a React frontend.

media.alt: Physics Grad Match application demo showing the AI-powered matching interface

skills.name: Open AI Embeddings and LLM model APIs

projects.impact: Connects physics applicants with relevant professors using scraped department data and vector search.

projects.title: Rep Quest
projects.subtitle: Workout tracker
projects.description: Built RepQuest, a mobile-friendly app for logging lifts and tracking progress.
projects.extendedDescription: Developed tracking flows for sets, reps, and weight by pairing a React frontend with backend storage and performance charts. Used the app from my phone for months in the gym.
projects.impact: Made workout history and progress easy to log from a phone.
